name: Benchmark update
about: A benchmark result is missing, outdated, or recorded under the wrong conditions
title: "[benchmark] "
labels: benchmark-update
---

## Benchmark

**Name and version:**
**Subset or split:**
**File where it should appear:**

## Model

**Exact model identifier, including any date or version suffix:**

## Result

**Score:**
**Metric:** <!-- accuracy, pass@1, resolved rate, Elo, exact match -->
**Unit:** <!-- percent, fraction, count, Elo, score -->

## Evaluation conditions

These are mandatory. A result whose conditions are unknown is recorded with
`unstated` and is excluded from ranked comparison, so please supply what you can.

**Harness and version:**
**Sampling policy:** <!-- single sample, greedy, best of n, majority vote at n, pass at k -->
**n or k, if applicable:**
**Tool permissions:** <!-- none, retrieval, code execution, browsing, full agent scaffold -->
**Scaffold description, for agent or repository-level results:**
**Evaluation date:**

## Source

**Who produced the result:**
**URL:**
**DOI, if any:**
**Publication date:**
**Proposed evidence grade:** <!-- A, B, or C. See docs/appendices/source-quality-framework.md -->

## Notes

<!-- Contamination concerns, deviations from the standard protocol, or a
     conflicting figure from another source. -->
